name_en: First, see the flat lay real shot! How popular is the Baguette bag? It's known by everyone online. Major brands are scrambling to imitate their own versions of the Baguette style, with LV, GG, and Fd being the most representative. BBR certainly won't be outdone and has designed its own version of the Baguette!
